name: Snek Left
author: Poki
description: Snek Left is a fun and blocky arcade game where you take control of a little yellow snake and help him get to the finish line. Seems easy? Think again! This tricky snake only goes to the right, but with your help, you can guide him in the correct direction and reach his goal. Can you finish all the levels? How to play Snek Left? Snek automatically goes to the right, press any button to make him go left. Who created Snek Left? Snek Left is created by Fancade. Play their other games on Poki: Roller , Dino Bros , Drive Mad , Gobble , Longcat , Mekorama , Monster Match , Monster Tracks , Odd Bot Out , Pool , Recoil , Roper , Speed King , Stacktris , and Wall of Doom ! How can I play Snek Left for free? You can play Snek Left for free on Poki. Can I play Snek Left on mobile devices and desktop? Snek Left can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
